claims.summary: Contact or feeling claims need explicit provenance classes rather than confident ungrounded narration.
claims.disposition: Verified source-class readback and correspondence provenance surfaces keep inference distinct from direct address.

claims.summary: A missing source class should remain visibly opaque instead of being silently promoted to contact.
claims.disposition: Verified bounded unknown/derived classifications and explicit authority language in current prompt/readback contracts.

claims.summary: Minime modality boundaries should expose metadata instead of acting as silent gates.
Increasing contact/admission or changing flow from these labels would be a live behavior change.
claims.disposition: Preserved as an exact Tier 5 Mike/operator approval wait.
